Andrew M. Zacks, Esq., 956-8100, for defendant/cross-complainant Empress LLC, moving for judgment on the pleadings
Peter L. Levy, Esq., 391-5270, for plaintiff/cross-defendant and opposing party West Cork Hotel, LLC
James Bledecher, Esq., 381-2493, co-counsel for plaintiff/cross-defendant

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT EMPRESS LLC'S MOTION For Judgment On The Pleadings By Empress, LLC; Request For Judicial Notice In Support -- Denied. Motion correctly showed West Cork was not an LLC but that has been corrected with no prejudice to Empress. Court allowed counsel to amend pleadings. Amended cross-complaint will be due on or before October 3, 2003. Answer to cross-complaint will be allowed accordingly. Mr. Zacks is to prepare an order. (301/JLW/N-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
